spine.label: Assessment intake
spine.description: A persona completes a CAPADEX / competency / behaviour assessment — the AI orchestration entry point.

spine.label: Evidence collection
spine.description: Per-question signals + scores are persisted as the evidence substrate AI analysis reasons over.

spine.label: AI analysis / reasoning
spine.description: The AI layer interprets the evidence (reasoning chains, narrative synthesis) over the collected signals.

spine.label: Confidence scoring
spine.description: Decision-time predictions are scored + calibrated (Brier/ECE) via the validation-loop mechanism — the Confidence axis.

spine.label: Explainability
spine.description: Each AI recommendation / decision is rendered into an explainable, human-readable rationale.

spine.label: Recommendation generation
spine.description: Development / career / competency recommendations are generated and persisted per subject.

spine.label: Intervention selection
spine.description: Recommendations are converted into actionable interventions matched to the subject.

spine.label: Learning plan
spine.description: Interventions compose into a personalised learning plan / pathway.

spine.label: Progress tracking
spine.description: Longitudinal snapshots track movement against baseline — the measured-progress input.

spine.label: Outcome validation
spine.description: Realized outcomes are captured into the canonical ledger and validated vs the decision-time prediction.

spine.label: Report generation
spine.description: A human-readable AI report is composed from the analysis, recommendations, explainability + outcomes.

spine.label: KPI update
spine.description: Realized outcomes + report engagement roll up into the enterprise-analytics KPI substrate.

capabilities.label: AI narrative analysis (LLM-backed)
capabilities.statusNote: LLM client wraps assessment evidence into narrative analysis; degrades honestly without OPENAI_API_KEY (null≠0).

capabilities.label: AI reasoning chains
capabilities.statusNote: Multi-step reasoning chains are generated + persisted; substrate present.

capabilities.label: Development recommendations
capabilities.statusNote: Competency-gap → development recommendation; persisted per subject.

capabilities.label: Intervention selection
capabilities.statusNote: Recommendations → actionable interventions; persisted per subject.

capabilities.label: Runtime explainability
capabilities.statusNote: Runtime guidance + per-decision explainability over the live evidence.

capabilities.label: Confidence / calibration scoring
capabilities.statusNote: Decision-time predictions are calibrated (Brier/ECE) via the validation-loop mechanism; calibrated CONFIDENCE abstains until ≥ k_min real pairs accrue (Confidence axis, null≠0).

capabilities.label: AI report generation
capabilities.statusNote: PIL + omega report builders compose human-readable AI reports; persisted in capadex_reports.

capabilities.label: KPI / enterprise analytics roll-up
capabilities.statusNote: Enterprise-analytics + benchmark engines compute KPI families; population is usage-driven (Adoption axis, null≠0).

capabilities.label: Decision orchestration
capabilities.statusNote: wc7b decision-orchestrator sequences the AI decision flow over the existing engines (orchestrates, never re-derives).

capabilities.label: Runtime AI guidance
capabilities.statusNote: Per-persona runtime guidance lens composes the AI outputs into actionable next-steps.

recommendation_criteria.label: Recommendations grounded in assessment evidence
recommendation_criteria.statusNote: Recommendations derive from the persisted signals/scores, not free-text — grounded chain.

recommendation_criteria.label: Recommendation → actionable intervention
recommendation_criteria.statusNote: Each recommendation maps to a selectable intervention.

recommendation_criteria.label: Recommendation → validated realized outcome
recommendation_criteria.statusNote: Realized outcomes capture into validation_loop_outcomes; effectiveness calibration abstains until ≥ k_min real pairs (Confidence/Adoption axes, null≠0).

recommendation_criteria.label: Recommendations are persona-aware
recommendation_criteria.statusNote: Per-persona runtime guidance lenses tailor the recommendation framing.

explainability_criteria.label: Per-recommendation rationale rendered
explainability_criteria.statusNote: CAPADEX explainability engine renders a rationale per recommendation/decision.

explainability_criteria.label: Runtime per-decision explainability
explainability_criteria.statusNote: Runtime explainability over the live evidence at decision time.

explainability_criteria.label: Evidence traceability (signal → recommendation)
explainability_criteria.statusNote: Recommendations trace to persisted signals; full per-token attribution is a Confidence axis (not fabricated).

explainability_criteria.label: Confidence disclosure (calibration surfaced honestly)
explainability_criteria.statusNote: Calibration (Brier/ECE) surfaced via the validation-loop mechanism; abstains until ≥ k_min (null≠0).

explainability_criteria.label: Explainability surfaced in human-readable report
explainability_criteria.statusNote: Rationale flows into the generated report body.

paths.label: Student → Growth AI loop
paths.aiAnalysis: Behaviour + competency narrative analysis (reasoning chains) over assessment evidence.
paths.explainability: Per-recommendation rationale rendered into the student report.
paths.statusNote: Full front-half AI loop is live; realized-outcome validation + KPI population are the universal adoption-gated tail (Adoption⟂Coverage).

paths.label: Fresher → Placement-Readiness AI loop
paths.aiAnalysis: Competency + readiness diagnosis; role-DNA crosswalk for fit.
paths.explainability: Readiness-gap rationale surfaced in the launchpad report.
paths.statusNote: Reaches the full AI→report→KPI loop; realized placement-outcome capture is the universal adoption-gated tail.

paths.label: Professional → Role-Progression AI loop
paths.explainability: Progression rationale vs baseline surfaced honestly (abstained calibration).
paths.statusNote: Reaches the full AI loop incl. report+KPI as a MECHANISM; validation is ADOPTION-pending (Coverage⟂Adoption⟂Confidence).

paths.label: Employee → Competency / EI AI loop
paths.statusNote: Competency + EI development AI loop is well-supported; realized development-outcome capture is the universal adoption-gated tail.

paths.label: HR / Recruiter → Hiring AI loop
paths.explainability: Match-rationale surfaced; calibration disclosed honestly (Brier/ECE abstain <k_min).
paths.recommendation: Talent-match ranking → interview → hire decision support.
paths.report: Hiring decision report; calibration reported separately.
paths.statusNote: The 9-stage hiring funnel is the most complete realized-outcome family; calibration abstains <k_min=30 (Confidence⟂Coverage).

paths.label: Institute Admin → Cohort AI loop
paths.report: Cohort report (aggregate; scores masked below k_min).
paths.statusNote: Real k-anon aggregation — scores masked below k_min, roster always shown. Realized cohort-outcome tail adoption-gated.

paths.label: Mentor / Coach → Mentee AI loop
paths.explainability: Guidance rationale surfaced to the mentor.
paths.statusNote: Mentor AI framing reuses the decision-orchestrator + runtime guidance; engagement volume is ADOPTION-driven (Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

paths.label: Parent → Support-Child AI loop
paths.aiAnalysis: Child progress framing via consent-scoped view.
paths.explainability: Support-action rationale surfaced to the parent.
paths.statusNote: Consent-scoped AI framing reuses runtime guidance; support-action volume is ADOPTION-driven (Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

paths.label: Institution → Aggregate Intelligence report
paths.statusNote: Aggregate-only AI report reuses benchmark + analytics; cohort volume is ADOPTION-driven (Coverage⟂Adoption).

decisions.rationale: AI analysis, reasoning, recommendation, intervention, explainability, report and KPI computation are ALL performed by EXISTING engines. This phase adds ONE read-only composer/registry that audits and orchestrates the READING of those capabilities — never a parallel AI / recommendation / report / KPI engine.

The composer verifies each capability by filesystem existence + persisted-output COUNT (to_regclass + COUNT(*)). It NEVER invokes an AI/reasoning/recommendation/report engine — proving zero behaviour change (byte-identical OFF, and no side effects ON).

Where a recommendation→outcome effectiveness rate is implied, it is WIRED via REUSE of the EXISTING validation-loop calibration mechanism (predicted_prob_at_decision; calibrationFromRows/toCalibrationPairs with a k_min gate) — zero new engine/table/DDL. The rate is honestly ABSTAINED (null) until ≥ k_min real non-demo pairs accrue (Confidence axis). Never fabricated.

Reports are composed by the existing PIL/omega builders (capadex_reports); KPI families roll up over the existing enterprise-analytics + benchmark substrate (anl_kpi_daily). Population is usage-driven (Adoption axis, null≠0) — no new report or KPI engine.

Coverage (a capability exists) ⟂ Confidence (calibrated/trustworthy) ⟂ Outcome (realized) ⟂ Adoption (real volume) are reported on their OWN axes and NEVER composited. null (unreadable) ≠ 0 (measured-empty). Revenue stays in capadex_payments and is never composited into AI/outcome KPIs.

recommendation.note: Substrate counts are MEASURED (Coverage); per-channel effectiveness_rate stays null because the decision-time prediction is recorded loop-level (validation_loop_outcomes), not per recommendation/intervention row — see the loop-level `calibration` block. Confidence⟂Coverage, null≠0.

intervention.note: Substrate counts are MEASURED (Coverage); per-channel effectiveness_rate stays null because the decision-time prediction is recorded loop-level (validation_loop_outcomes), not per recommendation/intervention row — see the loop-level `calibration` block. Confidence⟂Coverage, null≠0.

calibration.note: Loop-level effectiveness READ through the EXISTING validation-loop calibration mechanism (recordValidationOutcome captures predicted_prob_at_decision; calibrationFromRows calibrates with a k_min gate). status cold_start/provisional → effectiveness_rate null (Confidence axis, abstained, NEVER fabricated); flips to calibrated only when ≥ k_min non-demo pairs accrue. No engine invoked; zero DDL.

effectiveness.note: Recommendation→outcome EFFECTIVENESS. Substrate (recommendations, interventions, realized outcomes) is MEASURED (Coverage); loop-level calibrated effectiveness is WIRED via REUSE of the validation-loop calibration mechanism (`calibration` block) and abstains honestly (cold_start, rate null) until ≥ k_min real prediction+outcome pairs accrue — Confidence axis, null≠0, never fabricated. Demo subjects excluded. No engine is invoked; zero DDL.

gaps.title: Per-token / per-feature recommendation attribution (explainability depth)
gaps.evidence: Recommendations trace to persisted signals (capadex_session_signals → development_recommendations) and a reasoning chain (ai_reasoning_chains), but full per-feature attribution weights are not persisted. This is an explainability-DEPTH residual, not a broken chain — the rationale IS rendered.
gaps.remediation: OPTIONAL future enhancement: persist per-feature attribution from the existing reasoning engine output. Not Launch-Critical; explainability is already human-readable. No DDL in this phase.

gaps.title: Report engagement instrumentation (report adoption signal)
gaps.evidence: Reports are generated + persisted (capadex_reports) but report-open / share engagement is not instrumented as a first-class KPI. Report VOLUME is measurable; report ENGAGEMENT is an Adoption axis currently honest-low.
gaps.remediation: OPTIONAL: reuse the existing analytics substrate to roll up report engagement as usage accrues. Adoption-driven, never fabricated. No new engine.

resolved_gaps.title: AI analysis + reasoning chain over assessment evidence
resolved_gaps.closure: PRESENT via REUSE: aiClient + ai-reasoning-engine generate narrative analysis + reasoning chains (ai_reasoning_chains) over the persisted assessment signals. The composer READS their existence/output; it never invokes them. Degrades honestly without OPENAI_API_KEY (null≠0).
resolved_gaps.residual: CONFIDENCE/ADOPTION: AI output volume is usage-driven; LLM-backed depth depends on the configured key (reported separately, null≠0).

resolved_gaps.title: Recommendation → intervention → learning-plan chain
resolved_gaps.closure: PRESENT via REUSE: recommendation-intelligence + career-recommendation + mei-recommendation engines persist recommendations (development_recommendations/career_recommendations); intervention-intelligence selects interventions (capadex_interventions); learning-path-engine composes the plan. No new engine/table/DDL.
resolved_gaps.residual: ADOPTION: real recommendation/intervention volume is usage-driven (Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

resolved_gaps.title: Explainability / rationale rendering
resolved_gaps.closure: PRESENT via REUSE: capadex-explainability-engine + runtime-explainability-engine render a human-readable rationale per recommendation/decision, surfaced in the generated report.
resolved_gaps.residual: CONFIDENCE: per-feature attribution depth is an optional future enhancement (GAP-AI-1) — the rationale IS rendered today.

resolved_gaps.title: AI report generation
resolved_gaps.closure: PRESENT via REUSE: PIL + omega report builders compose human-readable AI reports persisted in capadex_reports and surfaced in the AI-powered report dashboards. No new report engine.
resolved_gaps.residual: ADOPTION: report volume + engagement are usage-driven (Coverage⟂Adoption; GAP-AI-2 for engagement instrumentation).

resolved_gaps.title: Recommendation → outcome effectiveness wired to the calibration mechanism
resolved_gaps.closure: CLOSED via REUSE (no new engine/table/DDL): composeEffectiveness READS the EXISTING validation-loop calibration mechanism — recordValidationOutcome captures predicted_prob_at_decision; calibrationFromRows/toCalibrationPairs turn non-demo prediction+outcome rows into a calibrated effectiveness block with a k_min gate. When ≥ k_min real pairs accrue the status flips to calibrated and the rate lights up automatically. Demo excluded; nothing fabricated.
resolved_gaps.residual: CONFIDENCE: until ≥ k_min real non-demo prediction+outcome pairs accrue the status is cold_start/provisional and effectiveness_rate stays null (abstained, NEVER fabricated). Reported via the `calibration` block, never a gap.

resolved_gaps.title: KPI computation substrate (enterprise analytics + benchmark)
resolved_gaps.closure: PRESENT via REUSE: the existing enterprise-analytics (anl_kpi_daily) + benchmark engines compute the KPI families. The composer READS coverage of this substrate; it never re-computes a KPI or builds a second KPI engine.
resolved_gaps.residual: ADOPTION: KPI population is usage-driven (Coverage⟂Adoption, null≠0).

decisions.rationale: AI analysis, reasoning, recommendation, intervention, explainability, report and KPI computation are ALL performed by EXISTING engines. This phase adds ONE read-only composer/registry that audits and orchestrates the READING of those capabilities — never a parallel AI / recommendation / report / KPI engine.

The composer verifies each capability by filesystem existence + persisted-output COUNT (to_regclass + COUNT(*)). It NEVER invokes an AI/reasoning/recommendation/report engine — proving zero behaviour change (byte-identical OFF, and no side effects ON).

Where a recommendation→outcome effectiveness rate is implied, it is WIRED via REUSE of the EXISTING validation-loop calibration mechanism (predicted_prob_at_decision; calibrationFromRows/toCalibrationPairs with a k_min gate) — zero new engine/table/DDL. The rate is honestly ABSTAINED (null) until ≥ k_min real non-demo pairs accrue (Confidence axis). Never fabricated.

Reports are composed by the existing PIL/omega builders (capadex_reports); KPI families roll up over the existing enterprise-analytics + benchmark substrate (anl_kpi_daily). Population is usage-driven (Adoption axis, null≠0) — no new report or KPI engine.

Coverage (a capability exists) ⟂ Confidence (calibrated/trustworthy) ⟂ Outcome (realized) ⟂ Adoption (real volume) are reported on their OWN axes and NEVER composited. null (unreadable) ≠ 0 (measured-empty). Revenue stays in capadex_payments and is never composited into AI/outcome KPIs.

enterprise_ready.note: ONE canonical AI-orchestration model audits every EXISTING AI / recommendation / report / analytics / explainability / orchestration capability into one coherent layer answering "assessment → AI analysis → confidence → explainability → recommendation → intervention → outcome-validation → report → KPI": a FROZEN 12-step AI spine, a capability inventory, recommendation-completeness + explainability criteria, report sections + dashboard surfaces, and a per-persona path register — every field mapped to the eight AI axes and verified against the live repo. The chain is mechanism-complete via REUSE-before-build: aiClient + ai-reasoning generate analysis; recommendation/intervention/learning engines + PIL/omega report builders + enterprise-analytics/benchmark KPI engines do the work; the recommendation→outcome effectiveness link is WIRED via REUSE of the existing validation-loop calibration mechanism. This phase adds ONE read-only composer/registry + ZERO new AI/report/KPI logic + ZERO schema; engines are read by existence/persisted-output, NEVER invoked. The dominant remaining axes are CONFIDENCE (calibration abstained until ≥ k_min real prediction+outcome pairs accrue) and ADOPTION (real AI/report/outcome/KPI volume, currently honest-low/0, reported SEPARATELY) — usage/data axes, NOT gaps. The verdict stays STRUCTURAL (engineering complete via reuse; adoption/confidence are data-driven and never fabricated). Coverage⟂Confidence⟂Outcome⟂Adoption are reported separately and never composited; null≠0.

adoption.note: ADOPTION axis only — exercise of the (reuse-instrumented) assessment→AI→recommendation→report→KPI loop. SEPARATE from Coverage; never composited. null = unreadable, 0 = measured-empty. Demo subjects excluded. AI/report/KPI machinery is REUSED — this phase builds NO new logic.

persona_linkage.note: Persona⟂AI-outcome linkage validated by a READ-TIME join (no persona column added, zero DDL). Per-persona counts below k_min are suppressed (masked) for anonymity. linkage_present:false means the join was unreadable, NOT that outcomes are zero (null≠0). Coverage⟂Outcome⟂Confidence never composited.
